KVK açıklaması

Students, who are trained as mechatronic technicians are the people, who deal at length with all the details of every electronic, mechanic and electrical devices in the technological field with especially information technologies, from their production to maintenance, repairing and operations.

The design, production and execution of the systems used by Mechatronic Technicians are specifically carried out to equip students with necessary vocational skills for them to work effectively. Overall, the program provides information about basic mechanical technologies in the first year, so that students can familiarize themselves with their profession as soon as possible.

Moreover, students will be required to complete an internship of a total of 30 business days, where they will reinforce their theoretical knowledge with practice and seize the opportunity to meet their future workplaces and coworkers, while they are still students.

Graduates of this program can work as “Mechatronic technicians” at public or private institutions and in sectors such as machinery, automotive, defense industry, space and energy.

Vertical Transfer Opportunities

Career Opportunities

Graduates of this program can work as “Mechatronic Technicians” at public or private institutions in sectors that work in machinery, automotive, defense industry, space and aviation, aircrafts and energy, production industry, Industry 4.0 and the Internet of Things.

Training Period

2 Years
